steps.title: Identify the boundary
steps.content: The shaded region is bounded by a horizontal line at $y = 29$. A horizontal boundary in the $xy$-plane corresponds to an inequality involving only $y$, not $x$.

steps.title: Determine the direction
steps.content:
The shading lies above the line $y = 29$ (and the boundary line itself appears solid, so it's included). That's the inequality $y \geq 29$.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
